case_title: BARCLAYS BANK DELAWARE VS. HOA LE et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-14-2014 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT AND DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 395(B) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BARCLAYS BANK DELAWARE AS TO DEFENDANT LE, HOA DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-21-2013
DECLARATION IN OPPOSITION TO OSC FILED BY PLAINTIFF BARCLAYS BANK DELAWARE
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-14-2014 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
